modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to add SDSU Rapid City rooms calendars to Outlook.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing difficulties while attempting to integrate the SDSU Rapid City rooms calendars into their Outlook application. This issue arises within the Office 365 environment, specifically on the insidestate.sdstate.edu platform. The user seeks guidance on how to successfully complete this process.
